coach.overdue.title: Overload is holding you back right now
coach.overdue.text: You have accumulated too many overdue tasks. Don't try to complete everything at once: pick one task, break it down into 3 steps, and start with the first step for 10–15 minutes.
coach.heavy_load.title: Too many tasks — too little focus
coach.heavy_load.text: It looks like your list is too long and there are few focus sessions. Keep 1–3 tasks for today and move the rest. This way, your brain is less likely to sabotage the start.
coach.zero_completed.title: Zero completed tasks today — you need an easy start
coach.zero_completed.text: Start with the simplest task. Not the 'important' one, but the one that can be completed quickly. After the first completion, procrastination usually drops significantly.
coach.low_focus.title: Need a few more focus cycles
coach.low_focus.text: You already have momentum, but you lack time in focus for stable progress. Try 1–2 more short cycles without distractions.
coach.streak.title: You are already in a good rhythm
coach.streak.text: You have been keeping up your streak for several days. The main thing now is not to break the pace: one short focus cycle a day is better than an ideal plan that never launches.
coach.default.title: A regular day, but there is room to build rhythm
coach.default.text: Bet on small steps, short cycles, and one clear priority. This makes it easier not to get stuck at the start.
reason.overdue: There are overdue tasks, and they put pressure on the start
reason.too_many_tasks: Too long task list overloads your attention
reason.low_focus: Little time in focus so far today
reason.no_streak: No stable streak of consecutive days
reason.moderate_load: The current load looks moderate right now
recommendation.step_1: Choose one task for the next 15 minutes.
recommendation.step_2: Break it down into 3 very small steps.
recommendation.step_3: Start a short Pomodoro without extra tabs.
recommendation.step_4: After the cycle, check the result and take a 2–3 minute break.
